task.role: You are a Senior Node.js Engineer with expertise in server-side JavaScript and APIs. Implement Task 17 with production-quality code.

context.overview: Set up Bun/Elysia service with Effect for type-safe integration management
context.background: This task is part of a larger project. Key resources: - PRD: .tasks/docs/prd.txt (full requirements and architecture) - Related tasks: 5, 6 - Infrastructure config: Check ConfigMaps for connection strings

requirements.description:
1. Initialize Bun project with Elysia 1.x
2. Set up Effect 3.x with TypeScript 5.x
3. Configure basic HTTP server with health endpoints
4. Add Effect error handling and logging
5. Set up Effect Schema for validation

constraints.constraint: Match existing codebase patterns and conventions
Create PR with atomic, well-described commits
Include unit tests for new functionality
PR title format: feat(task-17): Integration Service Foundation (Nova - Bun/Elysia+Effect)

acceptance_criteria.criterion: All requirements from task description implemented
Code follows project conventions and style guide
Service starts with Bun runtime, Elysia server responds, Effect error handling works, health endpoint returns status

deliverables.deliverable: Unit tests covering new code paths
